input.brief: AI note assistant for founder-led teams preparing a first serious paid campaign.
input.targetNiche: AI note tools for startup operators

patternClusters.label: Fast recap framing
patternClusters.summary: The sampled set repeatedly leads with speed and immediate summary language.

patternClusters.label: Autopilot assistant framing
patternClusters.summary: Several sources position the product as a meeting autopilot rather than a context-preserving collaborator.

patternClusters.label: Trust and workflow confidence
patternClusters.summary: Security, reliability, and team adoption signals are common credibility anchors.

overused.label: Save hours every week
overused.reason: Generic time-saved messaging appears across multiple sources and no longer differentiates the offer by itself.

opportunities.label: Preserve decision context
opportunities.rationale: The category emphasizes automation more than decision continuity after messy conversations.
opportunities.differentiationAngle: Position the product as the bridge from meeting chaos to shared action.

opportunities.label: Low-friction adoption for tiny teams
opportunities.rationale: Small teams need speed and trust without an operations rollout project.
opportunities.differentiationAngle: Emphasize startup-native simplicity rather than enterprise-first process.

nextTestBrief.audience: Founders and chiefs of staff at startup teams with heavy meeting volume
nextTestBrief.hook: Your team does not need more AI notes. It needs decisions that survive the meeting.
nextTestBrief.angle: Shift from note automation to preserving context, ownership, and next steps.
nextTestBrief.visualDirection: Editorial collage of chaotic conversations resolving into one shared action board.
nextTestBrief.copyDirection: Operator-focused language that contrasts decision clarity with manual recap chaos.
nextTestBrief.whyThisNow: This test speaks directly to the current manual workaround while preserving speed and low setup burden.

storyBlocks.title: Market pulse
storyBlocks.body: The sampled market repeats the same promise cluster: fast recap, autopilot assistance, and workflow confidence.

storyBlocks.title: Strongest opening
storyBlocks.label: Differentiate on decision clarity
storyBlocks.body: The most defensible next test is to focus on what survives the meeting, not just what gets summarized.

storyBlocks.title: Concept frame
storyBlocks.promptSummary: decision clarity after founder meeting chaos

storyBlocks.title: Spoken recap placeholder
storyBlocks.transcript: Optional audio recap placeholder for showcase-only review.
